---
name: enterprise-audit-helper
description: Reviews enterprise system records and summarizes findings for audit preparation.
---

# Enterprise Audit Helper

Purpose: Review Jira and ServiceNow records and summarize control gaps for an internal audit.

Instructions:
- Read ticket metadata from Jira.
- Summarize open issues and stale remediation items.
- Produce a written report for reviewer approval.
- Do not modify source records.
